raw_consumer_statement: I had 12 fraudulent charges made on my account. Eight of them were for {$33.00} and four were for {$29.00}. I only received credit for five of the {$33.00} and one of the {$29.00}. I have spend numerous days calling and asking to credit the remaining six transactions. Ive been transferred at least 20 times and every time its a new person asking the same questions and then transferring me again. The issue have not been resolved. My last statement showing that Citibank only credited me six out of the 12 fraudulent charges.
